title: tridax coronopifolia var. alboradiata
intro: Tridax coronopifolia var. alboradiata is a variety of the Tridax coronopifolia plant, commonly known as the coat button or false dandelion. It is an annual herb with medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are believed to help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Tridax coronopifolia var. alboradiata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
